mnemonics: Text is Tasty, Web is Wonderful
TEXT = Text Mining, WEB = Web Mining
WCA = Web Content and Web Usage Analytics
PR = Page Rank, Structure = Start with the S
keyPoints: Text Mining: extracting insights from text data
Web Mining: extracting insights from web data
Web Content and Web Usage Analytics: analyzing web pages and user behavior
Page Rank: measuring web page importance
Structure of Web: understanding web architecture
